predictedBugs: Empty project directory produces empty scout reports instead of graceful 'no files found' messages
Non-standard source directories (app/, packages/, lib/) are missed by archaeologist/detective which default to src/
Prisma schema regex fails on models with multi-line attributes or @map decorators before the brace
edgeCases: Very large projects (1000+ files) truncated by head -40/-60 limits in execSync calls
Binary files in source dirs matched by grep producing noise in detective phase output
Non-English git commit messages bypass ADR keyword detection
